summary: Completed Section 5 NLP-Powered Alerts + Call Transcripts testing. Backend: 14/14 tests PASSED. Frontend: All 10 UI verification points PASSED. CallTranscript CRUD, AI analysis, new stakeholder detection, and audit logging all working correctly.

issues: Minor HTML hydration warning in console - <span> inside <tbody> - cosmetic only, no functional impact

passed_tests: Backend: Login with gayatri.garg@anka.health / anka2026! (cs_lead)
Backend: GET /api/transcripts?client_id={id} returns transcript list (200)
Backend: POST /api/transcripts creates new transcript (200)
Backend: POST /api/transcripts with new attendees (not in contacts) creates transcript
Backend: POST /api/transcripts/{id}/analyze returns AI analysis with summary, action_items, sentiment, new_attendees
Backend: Transcript updated with analysis results after /analyze call
Backend: new_stakeholder alerts created for unrecognized attendees (severity: low)
Backend: Alerts endpoint supports frustration and scope_creep alert_type filters
Backend: transcript_create logged in audit logs
Backend: transcript_analysis (ai_generation) logged in audit logs
Backend: GET /api/transcripts requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/transcripts requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/transcripts/{id}/analyze requires authentication (401)
Frontend: Login successful with cs_lead credentials
Frontend: Client Detail Page loads correctly with tabs
Frontend: Communications tab visible and clickable
Frontend: 'Call Notes & Transcripts' section visible below communication history
Frontend: 'Upload Call Notes' button visible and clickable
Frontend: Upload dialog opens with Call Date, Duration, Attendees, Transcript text fields
Frontend: Upload dialog has 'Save & Analyze' button
Frontend: Transcript creation and AI analysis work via UI
Frontend: Sentiment badge (neutral/positive/frustrated) displays on transcripts
Frontend: 'new stakeholder' badge displays for transcripts with unrecognized attendees
Frontend: Blue 'New Stakeholders Detected' detail panel shows list of new attendees
Frontend: Settings > Audit Log tab shows transcript_create and ai_generation entries
critical_code_review_comments: CallTranscript model correctly implements all required fields: id, client_id, client_name, call_date, duration_minutes, attendees, transcript_text, summary, action_items, sentiment, new_attendees, source, created_by
NLP helper functions (analyze_email_sentiment, analyze_scope_creep) properly use Emergent LLM integration with PHI scrubbing
Transcript analysis endpoint correctly compares attendees against client_contacts to identify new stakeholders
new_stakeholder alerts created with correct severity='low' and trigger_data containing attendee details
Audit logging properly tracks transcript_create and transcript_analysis actions
Frontend properly handles AI response wait time and updates transcript list after analysis
seed_data_creation: Multiple test transcripts created during testing with TEST_ prefixed attendee names
context_for_next_testing_agent: Section 5 NLP-Powered Alerts + Call Transcripts fully tested. CallTranscript CRUD works via /api/transcripts endpoints. AI analysis generates summary, action_items, sentiment from transcript text via /api/transcripts/{id}/analyze. New stakeholder detection compares attendees against client_contacts and creates new_stakeholder alerts (severity=low). Audit logs track transcript_create and transcript_analysis (as ai_generation). Frontend ClientDetailPage.js Communications tab has Call Notes & Transcripts section with Upload dialog. All data-testid attributes present for form fields.
